summary.key_theme: Fastly 憑藉強勁的 AI 需求與邊緣運算架構優勢獲得市場評級調升，儘管仍面臨 GAAP 虧損與競爭壓力，但整體成長動能備受看好。

bullish.title: All You Need to Know About Fastly (FSLY) Rating Upgrade to Buy
bullish.reason: Zacks 將 Fastly 評級調升至買入，顯示機構投資人對其財務表現與未來成長潛力的信心增強。

bullish.title: Fastly: Why Margin Convergence With Cloudflare Justifies A Multiple Re-Rating
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Fastly 的邊緣架構在延遲與邏輯處理能力上優於 AWS，且利潤率正向 Cloudflare 收斂，具備估值重估空間。

bullish.title: Content Delivery Q4 Earnings: Fastly (NASDAQ:FSLY) is the Best in the Biz
bullish.reason: 基於 Q4 財報表現，Fastly 被評為內容傳遞網路領域的最佳業者，反映其營收成長強勁。

bullish.title: Fastly Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLY) Fits the Minervini Growth and Momentum Template
bullish.reason: 符合 Minervini 高成長動能模板，顯示該股在技術面上具備強勁的上升趨勢與爆發力。

bullish.title: Is Fastly’s (FSLY) Forrester Wave Win Reframing Its Edge Cloud Competitive Positioning?
bullish.reason: 在 Forrester Wave 評比中獲勝，顯著提升了 Fastly 在邊緣雲端市場的競爭地位與品牌認可度。

bullish.title: Fastly: The Future Is Bright, But Watch For These Threats
bullish.reason: 儘管提及風險，但整體維持買入評級，並強調 2026 年的營收指引與成長前景。

bearish.title: Fastly: Waiting For A Better Entry Point
bearish.reason: 指出 GAAP 虧損、高額股票薪酬 (SBC) 以及來自 Cloudflare 的激烈競爭，建議投資人等待更佳的進場點。

neutral.title: Upland Software, SoundHound AI, and Fastly Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 僅報導股價上漲的市場現象，未提供深入的個股基本面分析，屬於市場行情回顧。

neutral.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: NVIDIA, Fastly, SK Telecom, Zoom and Circle Group
neutral.reason: 將 Fastly 列入投資組合亮點清單，屬於綜合性市場資訊，對單一公司影響有限。
